summary: Comprehensive testing of SafeSteps Bern v3 update completed. Backend APIs 100% passed (17/17 tests). Frontend features fully working including new Legend component, traffic badges, detour badges, and expanded risk details.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - User registration successful
POST /api/auth/login - Login with test@test.com works
GET /api/schools - Returns exactly 15 schools with correct structure
GET /api/environment/status - Returns weather data (13°C, AQI 3)
POST /api/routes/calculate - Returns 2-3 routes with new risk_details fields
Routes have osm_risk, traffic_risk, crossing_risk, time_penalty, incident_risk
Routes have traffic_level field (low/medium/high/unknown)
Routes have detour_pct field (percentage)
data_sources includes traffic source: OTD (geschaetzt)
POST /api/route/alternatives - Returns multiple route alternatives
POST /api/route/safest - Returns single safest route
Non-existent school returns 404
Frontend: Login flow redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Legend component visible at bottom-right
Frontend: Legend toggle (collapse/expand) works
Frontend: Map with Leaflet loads correctly
Frontend: School markers displayed (15 blue dots)
Frontend: Route panel with school selector works
Frontend: Route calculation displays 2+ routes
Frontend: Safest route badge displayed (Sicherste Route)
Frontend: Traffic badge shows Maessiger/Wenig/Starker Verkehr
Frontend: Detour badge shows +X% Umweg
Frontend: Safety score badges (e.g., 87%, 64%)
Frontend: Risk details expand with all 5 new fields
Frontend: Data sources section shows ORS, Overpass+OSM, OTD
Frontend: Route polylines displayed on map with correct colors (green=safest)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v3 features verified: (1) Legend component works with toggle, (2) Route cards show traffic badges (Maessiger Verkehr) and detour badges (+X% Umweg), (3) Risk details show all 5 fields: Strassenrisiko, Live-Verkehr, Querungen, Zeitfaktor, Vorfaelle, (4) data_sources shows 'OTD (geschaetzt)' as traffic source. OTD SOAP API returns 403 so traffic data is time-based estimated (expected behavior per requirements). Login works with test@test.com/test1234.
mocked_apis_note: OTD traffic data uses time-based estimates (SOAP API returns 403). Weather sometimes falls back to mock. This is expected and documented in the review_request.
